goal: 收敛 signal 命令面并修正文档

summary.title: 收敛 explicit signal 命令面
summary.what: 移除顶层 singular `risk` / `followup` 命令，把创建入口统一到 `mainline risks add` 和 `mainline followups add`；同步 CLI help、错误提示、seal 指令、agent 模板、spec、Mainline skill、英文 README 和中文 README。
summary.why: `risk`/`risks` 与 `followup`/`followups` 的单复数分裂让命令模型冗余，也容易把用户引到不可执行或语义不清的入口；中文 README 还把 durable signals 描述成默认 seal 内容，和 explicit-only signal policy 不一致。
summary.user_goal: 收敛 signal 命令面并修正文档

decisions.chose: 只保留复数队列命令作为 risk/follow-up 的顶层入口：`risks add/resolve` 与 `followups add/resolve`。
decisions.rationale: 复数命令天然表示可列出、可新增、可关闭的队列；移除 singular 顶层命令后 root help 只展示一个稳定 mental model。
rejected: 保留 hidden/deprecated `risk add` 和 `followup add` 兼容入口

decisions.chose: 把 README、spec、skill、agent 模板和 runtime 提示全部改为 `mainline risks add` / `mainline followups add`。
decisions.rationale: 命令面没有兼容入口后，任何旧命令文案都会直接变成不可执行指导；中文 README 也必须反映 default seal 不创建 durable signals。

decisions.chose: 新增 CLI 命令树测试，断言 singular `risk` / `followup` 不注册，plural `risks add` / `followups add` 存在。
decisions.rationale: 这是一个命令面治理决策，轻量命令树测试比依赖人工看 help 更能防止入口反弹。

review_notes: 验证过 `go run . --help`，root help 只显示 `risks` 和 `followups`。
验证过 `go run . risk --help` 与 `go run . followup --help` 均返回 unknown command。
验证过 `go run . risks add --help`、`go run . followups add --help`、`go run . risks --help`、`go run . followups --help` 均展示新入口。

跑过 `go test ./internal/cli -run TestSignalCommandsUsePluralQueues`、`go test ./internal/engine -run 'Test(BuildSealStarterOmitsActionSignals|ValidateSealActionSignalContractRejectsSealSignals|ExplicitSignalEventsMaterialize)$'`、`go test ./internal/engine -run 'Test(ParseRiskID|RiskID|MaterializeRisks|MaterializeOpenRisks|FilterOpenRisks|ParseFollowupID|FollowupID|MaterializeFollowups|MaterializeOpenFollowups|FilterOpenFollowups)'`。
曾尝试 `go test ./internal/cli ./internal/engine`，`internal/cli` 已通过，但 `internal/engine` 聚合测试过重，已停止并改跑上述聚焦测试；未运行 `make test`。

architectural_claims: Explicit risk and follow-up creation now lives under the same plural queue commands that list and resolve those signals.
Default seal remains decision/review-note oriented; durable signals are still created outside seal through explicit commands.
behavioral_changes: `mainline risk` and `mainline followup` are no longer registered top-level commands.
`mainline risks add` creates structured explicit risks.
`mainline followups add` creates explicit deferred work items.
`mainline guard bogus` now exits with an unknown-command error instead of printing help successfully.
migration_notes: No compatibility aliases were kept by request; users should update scripts/docs from `risk add` to `risks add` and from `followup add` to `followups add`.
